turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I need to see a gastroenterologist. I've been having acid reflux issues for months now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Let me help you book an appointment. Your name please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Abhijeet. Our gastroenterologist Dr. Nitin Kadam is available on Tuesday and Friday mornings. Any preference?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Friday would be better. What time?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have 9:30 AM and 11 AM on Friday.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: 9:30 AM please. Let's get it over with early.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Abhijeet More, Friday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Nitin Kadam. SMS on the way. See you Friday!
